summary: Vertical video. A re-post of the narrated USCIS 'Need to register? Do it now' PSA, with stock B-roll (laptop typing, a DHS flag, a classroom) under a voiceover, caption text, and an ARR logo and URL end card explaining the Alien Registration Requirement. On-screen and spoken text includes 'with the U.S. government as an alien?', 'aliens register with the U.S. government', 'and you are 14 or older', 'If you are a parent', 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: with the U.S. government as an alien?; aliens register with the U.S. government; and you are 14 or older; If you are a parent; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
